Helium Evolution achieves milestone with first commercial sales of Helium.

data.title: Collective Metals finds strong surface radioactivity in Rocas Uranium Project during exploration program.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, an announcement was made on October 16, 2025, by COLLECTIVE METALS INC. regarding preliminary findings from its 2025 exploration initiative at the Rocas Uranium Project. The company, also known as Collective, is listed as CSE: COMT, OTC: CLLMF, and FSE: TO1. Rocas is subject to a three-year earn-in arrangement with Standard Uranium Ltd., listed as TSXV:STND. Between September 30th and October 8th, 2025, Collective performed an extensive mapping and sampling campaign over previous uranium manifestations and target areas within the project site. The assessment unveiled various zones exhibiting substantial radioactivity levels.

data.title: SGBX subsidiary, Olenox, completes Phase 1 of wellsite monitoring system, with Phase 2 to launch shareholder dashboard soon.
data.description: The initial phase of a sophisticated wellsite monitoring system has been successfully finished, paving the way for the upcoming launch of Phase 2 which will introduce a real-time shareholder dashboard. Important milestones have been achieved in the development process, with the completion of Phase 1 marking a significant progress towards enhancing operational efficiency and data accessibility. The forthcoming implementation of the real-time dashboard in Phase 2 is expected to provide shareholders with immediate access to crucial wellsite information and insights. This technological advancement underscores the commitment to leveraging cutting-edge solutions in the industry, with a focus on boosting transparency and communication.

data.title: Riot Platforms sets Q3 2025 earnings call for Oct 30 amidst Bitcoin mining growth in data centers, expansion.
data.description: A top Bitcoin mining company, Riot Platforms, has revealed plans for its Q3 2025 earnings call set to take place on October 30, 2025. The company, known for its prominent position in the industry, is actively expanding its presence in data centers and mining operations. This development highlights Riot Platforms' ongoing growth strategy and commitment to advancing its operations. Investors and stakeholders are eagerly awaiting the financial results and insights that will be shared during the upcoming earnings call.

data.title: TC Energy will host a conference call on Nov. 6, 2025 to discuss Q3 financial results, financial outlook, and other updates. Includes an update on the Company's financial outlook.
data.description: TC Energy Corporation, a leading energy company, based in Calgary, Alberta, has announced that they will be hosting a teleconference and webcast on November 6, 2025. This event will primarily focus on discussing the financial results for the third quarter of the year. TC Energy, listed on both the TSX and NYSE under the ticker symbol TRP, will provide insights into its financial outlook for the coming months as well as share any recent significant developments. This information will be crucial for investors and stakeholders to gain a better understanding of the company's performance and future prospects.

data.title: Kinaxis Inc. will host Q3 2025 financial results conference call on Nov 6, 2025 at 8:30 AM ET with CEO and CFO.
data.description: Kinaxis Inc. (TSX:KXS), a top player in end-to-end supply chain management, revealed plans for a conference call to review its financial performance in Q3 of 2025 ending on September 30. The call, set for Thursday, November 6 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, will feature Bob Courteau, the interim CEO and chair, along with Blaine Fitzgerald, the CFO. The session will include a Q&A segment.

data.title: Diodes Inc. (Nasdaq: DIOD) will announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 6, 2025, 4:00pm CT. CEO, CFO, SVP to host call.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to take place on Thursday, November 6th at 4:00 p.m. CT (5:00 p.m. ET) by Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) to review its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. Leading the call will be Gary Yu, the President, and CEO, along with Brett Whitmire, the CFO, and Emily Yang, the Senior VP of Worldwide Sales and Marketing. The Company plans to disclose the details of its third-quarter performance during this call.

data.title: Bright Horizons Family Solutions (BFAM) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 30 after market closes, followed by investor call at 5:00pm ET.
data.description: Bright Horizons Family Solutions Inc. is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, on October 30, 2025, post the stock market closure. The company, traded under NYSE: BFAM, will additionally conduct a conference call with investors and analysts at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day. The call will cover details about the third quarter of 2025, the company's revised business projections, strategic moves, and outcomes. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing in.

data.title: Enhabit Home Health & Hospice to report Q3 earnings on Nov. 5, 2025. Conference call on Nov. 6 at 9am EST. Call info: 888-660-6150, Conference ID: 524.
data.description: Enhabit, Inc. (NYSE: EHAB), a prominent national provider of home health and hospice services, has disclosed that they are set to release their financial results for the third quarter ending on Sept. 30, 2025, on Nov. 5, 2025. Moreover, the company will be conducting a webcast and conference call on Nov. 6, 2025. Interested individuals looking to partake in the conference call webcast are encouraged to join 15 minutes before the designated start time. The conference call is scheduled for Nov. 6, 2025, at 9 a.m. EST. For those within the US, the toll-free number to dial is 888-660-6150, while international participants can dial 929-203-0843. To access the conference, the ID to input is 524.

data.title: Estée Lauder Companies to discuss fiscal 2026 Q1 results on Oct 30, 2025. Webcast available at 8:30 am (ET) - CEO and CFO to host.
data.description: Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) is set to unveil its fiscal 2026 Q1 results on October 30, 2025. The event will commence at 8:30 a.m. (ET) with a live webcast of the conference call led by Stéphane de La Faverie, President and CEO, and Akhil Shrivastava, EVP and CFO. The webcast, focusing on financial outcomes, future outlook, and recent corporate advancements, can be accessed at http://www.elcompanies.

data.title: Tether aims for Juventis impact, nominating executive to board after eight months of investment in the football club.
data.description: The issuer of a stablecoin has verified reports indicating their intention to appoint members to the football club's board of directors, approximately eight months following their initial investment.

data.title: Davis Wright Tremaine LLP files federal lawsuit challenging Texas App Store Accountability Act for violating First Amendment.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, a federal lawsuit was filed by Students Engaged in Advancing Texas (SEAT) and two Texas minors questioning the constitutionality of the Texas App Store Accountability Act. They argue that the law violates the First Amendment by placing broad limitations on access to protected speech and information. Another lawsuit was also filed on the same day by the Computer & Communications Industry Association challenging the Act. The Act is set to take effect on January 1st.

data.title: Newsmax buys $5 million in Bitcoin and Trump Coin, sees stock rise. CEO calls Bitcoin the "gold standard of cryptocurrency."
data.description: Shares of Newsmax Inc (NYSE: NMAX) are on the rise in after-hours trading following the company's announcement of a new asset reserve plan involving the purchase of cryptocurrencies. Newsmax revealed its intention to follow in the footsteps of over 100 public companies by adding Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Trump Coin (CRYPTO: TRUMP) to its balance sheet. The board has approved a strategic plan to buy up to $5 million worth of Bitcoin and Trump Coin within the next year. Newsmax CEO Christopher Ruddy stated, "Bitcoin is quickly becoming the standard cryptocurrency, and we see it as a significant company milestone to include this asset in our reserves." This move reflects Newsmax's confidence in the growth and stability of cryptocurrency assets.

data.title: IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) declares $0.88/share dividend, payable Dec 1, 2025 to holders of record on Nov 5, 2025.
data.description: Boise, Idaho - The directors of IDACORP, Inc. (NYSE: IDA) have announced a common stock dividend of $0.88 per share. This dividend is set to be paid out on December 1, 2025, to shareholders of record as of November 5, 2025.
